name: commercial-policy
description: > Commercial policy: the written governance framework that defines what commercial terms sales can offer, what triggers approval, and what's off-limits. Use when authoring or refreshing a company commercial-policy charter, defining discount / contract / payment / termination / liability policies, auditing existing deals for policy compliance, drafting commercial-policy training for sales, or generating a tailored policy for a new region or vertical. author: borghei
